## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `cargo check --workspace`
- [ ] `docker compose config`

## Canonical impact

- [ ] Updated ADRs if architecture changed
- [ ] Updated decision register if stack or topology changed
- [ ] Updated contracts or schemas if interfaces changed
